name: Oatmeal Chocolate Chip Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat the brown sugar and shortening until light and fluffy.
2. Add molasses, vanilla extract, and eggs; blend well.
3. Stir in oats, flour, baking soda, and salt; blend well.
4. Stir in chopped nuts and chocolate chips.
5. Pour the mixture into a greased 15x10-inch jelly-roll pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 20 to 25 minutes, or until lightly golden brown and the center is set.
7. Cool slightly, then cut into bars.
